## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into GrowthX's performance and new platform capabilities with Rapyd team](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Onboarding process needs improvement, especially for enterprise clients with strict security measures](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=409.0)
  - [Content calibration is ongoing, with persistent challenges in hyperlinking, business model changes, and unwanted best practices](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [New GrowthX platform offers enhanced AI editing and workflow customization capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Strategic discussion needed on evolving SEO landscape and expanding Rapyd's digital footprint](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1092.0)

## Topics

### Engagement Context and Motivations

  - [Started in February 2023, now in 5th month](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Rapyd interested in AI-powered content generation and SEO](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=289.0)
  - [Wanted an AI-native team to stay ahead in the space](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Seeking to maintain and improve inbound traffic visibility](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Onboarding and Security Challenges

  - [Enterprise-grade security measures complicated direct CMS access](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Developed workaround: XML file import via WP plugin](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Need for flexible, secure content ingestion solutions for enterprise clients](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Suggestion: API integration or well-documented plug-in options](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)

### Content Calibration Process

  - [Generally smooth, but ongoing refinement needed](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)
  - [95% accuracy achieved quickly, last 5% more challenging](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)
  - [Persistent issues: competitor hyperlinking, outdated info, unwanted best practices](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=877.0)
  - [Solution: Improved artifacts, polishing instructions, and AI editor in new platform](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=786.0)

### New GrowthX Platform Features

  - [AI editor with chat functionality and custom instructions](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1747.0)
  - [Detailed workflow visualization and customization options](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
  - [Improved content generation pipeline with multiple steps (research, drafting, fact-checking)](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)
  - [Enhanced ability to set domain preferences, blacklist/whitelist sources](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1812.0)

### SEO Strategy and Market Changes

  - [Shifting dynamics in SEO and SERP visibility](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Need to adapt to AI-driven search results and featured snippets](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Exploration of niche verticals (e.g., high-risk industries) for Rapyd](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1173.0)
  - [Potential strategies: increasing website surface area, building affiliate sites, focusing on audience ownership](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1200.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Schedule strategic session to discuss evolving SEO landscape and Rapyd's digital strategy](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
  - [Implement improved instructions for blacklisting competitors and refining review processes](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)
  - [Enhance onboarding process documentation, especially for enterprise security scenarios](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
  - [Set up regular (e.g., 6-8 week) strategic review sessions with pre-work and focused agendas](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
  - [GrowthX to follow up on specific action items discussed during the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/9r5cWxhzT3tsq-sUJpJhVmsbRfP1nWni?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
